secondary.name: Manrope
secondary.usage: Body text, UI elements, Buttons, Inputs

rules.headings: Tracking-tight, Leading-none, Uppercase for H5/H6 labels. Use font-rajdhani.
rules.hero_text: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-9xl font-bold tracking-tighter uppercase

borders.tracing_beam: A glowing gradient line that travels around the container edge. Use framer-motion for animation.

marketing.name: Tetris Grid
marketing.rules: Mix col-span-4, col-span-8, and row-span-2. Never symmetric.

dashboard.name: Bento Grid
dashboard.rules: Dense packing. Use h-full to stretch items.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-sm
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 text-white bg-transparent backdrop-blur-sm transition-all duration-300 rounded-sm

cards.marketing: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-500 rounded-xl
cards.dashboard: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 rounded-lg p-6 hover:bg-[#0F0F0F] transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-black/20 border border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 placeholder:text-white/20 text-white rounded-md h-12

hero.alt: Futuristic digital artist with neon body paint

music_studio.alt: AI Music Studio Interface with Waveforms

marketplace_bg.alt: Neon City Skyline for Marketplace Background

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Update 'tailwind.config.js' to extend colors with the provided palette. Do NOT just rely on default shadcn variables. OVERRIDE them for the 'dark' theme.
3. FONTS: Import 'Rajdhani' and 'Manrope' in 'index.css' via Google Fonts.
4. LAYOUT: For the Landing Page, use the 'Tetris Grid' logic. Do not make it a boring list of sections. Overlap elements.
5. GLASSMORPHISM: Apply the 'glass' utility heavily on the Dashboard sidebar and top navigation.
6. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Do NOT use placeholders.
7. GRADIENTS: Use gradients for BORDERS and TEXT, not for full backgrounds (keeps it clean).
8. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
